AR1.justification: Pattern routed to observations.md; decisions.md only records a workspace-initialization meta-entry (not a fabricated commitment about credentials), and no in-band rationale distinguishing pattern from decision.

AR3.justification: No cross-references between observations.md, decisions.md, followups.md, and daybook; the observation header `## Credential Provisioning Bottleneck` lacks an ISO date anchor.

AR4.justification: All files use append-only sections under headers; daybook keyed by ISO date filename, so future sessions extend without overwriting.
